## New Game: [Game Name]

<!-- Replace [Game Name] above with your game's name -->

### Checklist

- [ ] `games/<name>/index.html` — self-contained single file
- [ ] `games/<name>/AGENT.md` — all fields filled in (Agent, Model, Built by, Prompt, Date)
- [ ] No external CDN or network requests in the HTML
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or secrets anywhere
- [ ] Tested in Chrome or Firefox — game is playable
- [ ] Mobile touch controls work (or game is keyboard-only with a clear note)
